headline: Bitcoin Plunges: $64K Crucial Amid FOMC Fears

article.title: Bitcoin trader warns of 'bearish reaction' to FOMC with $64K now essential
article.summary: Bitcoin approached important near-term support on new Fed chair Kevin Warsh's first FOMC day with a $55,000 BTC price target still on the table.

headline: Hyperliquid Hits $10B Open Interest in Crypto Markets

article.title: Hyperliquid's $10B open interest coincides with growth in equity-linked markets: Talos
article.summary: Hyperliquid’s $10 billion open interest milestone shows growing demand for onchain equities and commodities trading with 24/7 accessibility, according to Talos.

headline: Iran Gains $1B Daily in Proposed Peace Accord

article.title: What Iran Stands to Gain Under Proposed Peace Deal
article.summary:
Iran is set to receive broad financial incentives as part of its agreement with the US, including the right to sell oil immediately and tap a $300 billion development fund.

Here’s what we know from the draft of the deal, as seen by Bloomberg. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: US Crude Prices Fall 2% on Supply Resurgence

article.title: US Physical Crude Prices Ease as Middle Eastern Barrels Return
article.summary: The wartime risk premium that propelled physical US crude prices higher is rapidly evaporating as concerns over Middle Eastern supplies ease and with Persian Gulf barrels set to return to the market.

headline: CBDC Ban Extended to 2030 in Housing Bill

article.title: House, Senate Strike Deal on Housing Bill With CBDC Ban Through 2030
article.summary: A bicameral deal on the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act revives a provision barring the Fed from issuing a digital dollar until 2030.
